tasks.label: Run tooling
tasks.command: ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m ruff format . && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m ruff check --fix . && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pyright && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip_audit --cache-dir .pip-audit-cache --skip-editable && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pytest --cov=gesha --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=xml && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m build
